title: Create: Guardian-shooter
description: Auto-targeting for CBC the with Aeronautics support
body:
_Hello, everyone. First of all, I strongly recommend that you download projects through the official curseforge and modrinth launchers—this will increase the reward for the creators. Thank you all very much for your support!!!_

[![chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f7ba56bdea313f30d12390daaabdd4d5e3893385.webp)](https://discord.gg/s8vZR4PGr2)

**Automatic Targeting System for Cannons**

This mod adds a fully-featured automatic targeting system for mounted cannons, designed to reduce manual control and enable advanced combat automation.

Instead of manually aiming and firing, you can build a modular control structure that handles targeting, rotation, and shooting for you.

![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/88773c51fec72f4996b96ba6207fc6ececa09cd0.gif)

Version 1.0.6 adds a new block that sets filters and activates or deactivates all controllers within a 20-block radius

![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/662974906eddd469d11625f1c0029b93511af6c1.gif)

Version 1.0.7 adds  cartridge_collector Добавлен новый блок, который собирает отработанные гильзы и патроны, лежащие на земле.

Version 1.0.10 It has been decided to remove the auxiliary blocks that appear when the controller block is activated. Now you can place the cannon much more tightly on your structures. If you have any interesting suggestions, please join us on Discord.

1.0.15
Added a Machine Soul block that allows for automatic control of structures via redstone links from the Create mod.

![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/811398beb325c778b4be7a2c74a7570d87efe9ba.gif)

1.0.16 Added new interface and new functions in the soul machine block.

 ![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/988778aceeab7138dfd5e7124e29333b2c302d6f.gif)

**Features**
 
Automatic Targeting

Cannons can automatically detect and track targets in range.
 
**Advanced Target Filtering**

Configure exactly what your cannon should attack:

Hostile mobs

Passive mobs

Players

Custom categories

 **Player Whitelist**
 
Prevent friendly fire by excluding specific players from targeting.
 
**Modular Control System**

Uses multiple functional blocks:

Controller (main logic & UI)

Pitch / Yaw control (aiming)

Fire control

**Built-in Ammo Handling**

Controller can act as an item input for feeding autocannons.
 
**In-Game UI**

Easily configure targeting behavior, filters, and activation.
 
**Multiplayer Ready**

Fully synchronized between client and server.
 
**How it works**

Install the control unit on the gun.There should be no blocks around the sides of the base for opening that overlap the sides responsible for shooting actions and the sides of the sides for vertical and horizontal aiming.

(At this point, you can install the controller unit on an existing physical structure)

Place the controller block on the mount
Make sure the structure has enough space to assemble
Open the UI and configure targeting
Activate the system

 **Use Cases**
Automated base defense systems

PvE mob farms with artillery

PvP turret setups

Technical builds without complex redstone

[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be430e7f950991c85de23828c5efe38f082a33c8.webp)](https://ko-fi.com/iyouroverlord!) [![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b47082063c60d519ee5fd5b194cc1b85bc1a976d.png)](https://www.patreon.com/c/IYourOverlord)[![sup](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a51142c3cb736fe0310203307c1221610885d03c.png)](https://www.paypal.com/donate/?hosted_button_id=E7U2TQU7QAVJN)
